Third-party code vendored for self-hosted serving. Unmodified builds from npm.

butterchurn.min.js
  butterchurn v2.6.7 — WebGL implementation of the MilkDrop 2 visualizer.
  Copyright (c) Jordan Berg. MIT License.
  https://github.com/jberg/butterchurn

butterchurnPresets.min.js
  butterchurn-presets v2.4.7 — classic MilkDrop community presets converted
  for Butterchurn (presets copyright their original authors).
  MIT License. https://github.com/jberg/butterchurn-presets

--- Self-hosted brand fonts (public/assets/fonts/) ---

JetBrains Mono (jetbrains-mono-latin.woff2)
  SIL Open Font License 1.1. Latin subset, variable weight.
  https://github.com/JetBrains/JetBrainsMono

Satoshi (satoshi-500/700/900.woff2)
  Indian Type Foundry, via Fontshare — free license permits web embedding
  and self-hosting. https://www.fontshare.com/fonts/satoshi
